background.text: a diagram model with stock Stock1 at 100 100
flow Flow1 runs from stock Stock1 to stock Stock2
connector Connector1 runs from converter Converter1 to flow Flow1

steps.text: I set converter Converter1 name to <new_name>
the diagram should contain converter Growth
converter Growth canvas name should be Growth
connector Connector1 should run from converter Growth to flow Flow1

scenarios.name: Set connector formula from converter editor

steps.text: I set converter Converter1 formula to <formula>
connector Connector1 formula should be Stock1 * 0.1
connector Connector1 canvas formula should be Stock1 * 0.1
I set converter Converter1 name to Converter2
the converter edit should be rejected
the diagram should contain converter Converter1
the diagram should contain converter Converter2

scenarios.name: Reject formula edit without converter to flow connector

steps.text: I set converter Converter2 formula to Stock1 * 0.2
the converter edit should be rejected
connector Connector1 should have no formula
